name: Shared Infrastructure
description: Foundation: types, constants, utilities, layout, theme provider, shared UI components, test setup
acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript types defined for PageMetadata, ScoreResult, SeoScores, PreviewOptions, ScreenshotConfig, WidgetOptions
SERP constants defined for Google Desktop, Google Mobile, Bing, and Social Card dimensions and styles
Root layout renders with Geist fonts, metadata, and theme support
Shared UI components (Button, Input, Textarea, Badge, Card, Tabs, Tooltip, ProgressBar) render correctly
Tailwind CSS configured with custom SERP-accurate color tokens
Vitest and Playwright configured and passing with empty test suites
CSP and security headers configured in next.config.ts
ESLint and TypeScript strict mode pass with zero errors

name: Meta Input Form
description: Input form for title, meta description, URL, and keyword with real-time character counting
acceptanceCriteria: Given the input form is displayed, when a user types in the title field, then the character count updates in real-time
Given the input form is displayed, when a user types in the description field, then the character count updates in real-time
Given a URL is entered, when it is invalid, then a validation error message appears below the field
Given all fields are empty, when the page loads, then placeholder example values are shown in the previews
Given the user types in any field, when the input changes, then all previews update within 16ms (single frame)

name: Google Desktop SERP Preview
description: Pixel-perfect Google desktop search result preview with keyword bolding and truncation
acceptanceCriteria: Given a title, description, and URL are entered, when the Google preview renders, then the title appears as a blue clickable link in Google's exact font (Google Sans / Arial, 20px)
Given a URL is entered, when the preview renders, then the URL appears in green text with breadcrumb format matching Google's current SERP style
Given a title longer than 60 characters, when the preview renders, then the title is visually truncated with an ellipsis at the pixel-accurate cutoff point
Given a description longer than 160 characters, when the preview renders, then the description is truncated with '...' matching Google's behavior
Given a keyword is entered, when it appears in the title or description, then it is displayed in bold in the preview (matching Google's keyword bolding)

name: Google Mobile SERP Preview
description: Pixel-perfect Google mobile search result preview with mobile-specific truncation
acceptanceCriteria: Given a title is entered, when the mobile preview renders, then the title truncates at ~50 characters (matching Google mobile behavior)
Given a description is entered, when the mobile preview renders, then the description truncates at ~120 characters
Given the mobile preview is displayed, when rendered, then it uses mobile-width container (360px) with Google's mobile SERP styling
Given the mobile preview is active, when compared to desktop preview, then font sizes and spacing match Google's actual mobile SERP

name: SEO Score Dashboard
description: Comprehensive scoring dashboard with title, description, keyword, mobile truncation, and overall score
acceptanceCriteria: Given a title is entered, when scored, then the title score shows green (30-60 chars), yellow (61-70 chars), or red (<30 or >70 chars) with specific feedback
Given a description is entered, when scored, then the description score shows green (120-160 chars), yellow (161-200 chars), or red (<120 or >200 chars)
Given a keyword is entered, when checked, then the keyword presence score indicates whether it appears in title, description, both, or neither
Given title and description are entered, when mobile truncation is checked, then a warning appears if title >50 chars or description >120 chars
Given all scores are calculated, when the overall score displays, then it is a weighted average (title 40%, description 40%, keyword 20%) shown as 0-100 with color coding

name: Bing SERP Preview
description: Pixel-perfect Bing search result preview with Bing-specific styling and truncation
acceptanceCriteria: Given a title, description, and URL are entered, when the Bing preview renders, then the styling matches Bing's current SERP (Segoe UI font, different blue shade, different URL format)
Given a title longer than 65 characters, when the Bing preview renders, then it truncates at Bing's cutoff point (which differs from Google)
Given a description is entered, when the Bing preview renders, then it truncates at ~160 characters matching Bing's behavior

name: Social/OG Card Preview
description: Social media card preview (Facebook/LinkedIn format) with OG image placeholder
acceptanceCriteria: Given OG title and description are entered (or fall back to regular title/description), when the social card renders, then it shows a large card format with image placeholder, title, description, and domain
Given no OG image URL is provided, when the preview renders, then a placeholder with dimensions (1200x630) and 'Add OG Image URL' prompt is shown
Given an OG image URL is provided, when valid, then the image loads in the preview card
Given the social card is displayed, when rendered, then it matches the Facebook/LinkedIn large card format (title below image, description below title, domain at bottom)

name: Preview Tab Container
description: Tabbed container organizing all preview types (Google Desktop, Google Mobile, Bing, Social Card)
acceptanceCriteria: Given all preview components exist, when rendered in tabs, then each tab shows the correct preview
Given a tab is selected, when clicking a different tab, then the preview switches instantly
Given the preview container renders, when viewed on mobile viewport, then tabs stack or scroll horizontally

name: Screenshot Export
description: Download PNG screenshot of any preview with watermark branding
acceptanceCriteria: Given any preview tab is active, when the user clicks 'Download Screenshot', then a PNG image of the preview is downloaded
Given the screenshot is generated, when downloaded, then the image includes only the preview area (not the input form or scores)
Given the screenshot is generated, when downloaded, then a small watermark 'Generated by [tool name] — [URL]' appears at the bottom
Given the download button is clicked, when generating, then a loading spinner shows and completes within 2 seconds

name: Embeddable Widget
description: Compact embeddable widget with iframe embed code generator and 'Powered by' backlink
acceptanceCriteria: Given the embed page is visited, when the user clicks 'Get Embed Code', then a copyable HTML snippet is displayed
Given the embed code is pasted into any website, when the page loads, then a compact version of the tool renders in an iframe
Given the widget is embedded, when rendered, then it includes a 'Powered by [tool name]' link that opens in a new tab
Given the widget is embedded, when rendered, then it is responsive (min-width 320px, max-width 100%)
Given the widget is embedded, when a user interacts with it, then previews and scores work identically to the main tool

name: Dark Mode
description: System-aware dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence
acceptanceCriteria: Given the tool loads, when the user's system preference is dark mode, then the tool renders in dark mode by default
Given the tool is in light mode, when the user clicks the theme toggle, then all UI elements switch to dark mode within 100ms
Given dark mode is active, when SERP previews render, then Google/Bing previews show in their light theme (since SERPs are always light)
Given the user toggles theme, when they revisit the tool, then their preference is persisted via localStorage

name: Affiliate Recommendations
description: Contextual, non-intrusive affiliate CTAs for Ahrefs, Semrush, and SurferSEO in the score results area
acceptanceCriteria: Given scores are displayed, when the keyword score is low, then an Ahrefs affiliate CTA appears suggesting deeper keyword research
Given scores are displayed, when the overall score is below 70, then a Semrush affiliate CTA appears suggesting a full site audit
Given affiliate CTAs are displayed, when rendered, then they appear only in the score area, never overlapping previews
Given affiliate CTAs are displayed, when clicked, then they open affiliate URLs in a new tab with rel='noopener sponsored'

name: Dynamic OG Image
description: Server-side OG image generation for shareable tool links showing score and preview
acceptanceCriteria: Given the /api/og route is called with title and score params, when processed, then a 1200x630 PNG image is returned
Given the OG image is generated, when shared on social media, then it shows the tool branding with the score prominently displayed
Given no params are provided, when the route is called, then a default branded OG image is returned

name: History / Recent Checks
description: localStorage-based history of last 20 checks with one-click repopulation
acceptanceCriteria: Given the user has performed at least one check, when they view history, then the last 20 checks are listed with title, score, and timestamp
Given history exists, when the user clicks a history entry, then the form repopulates with that entry's data
Given history is stored, when stored, then it uses localStorage (no server, no account required)
Given localStorage is full or disabled, when the tool loads, then it degrades gracefully with no history shown

name: Bulk CSV Check
description: Upload CSV of titles/descriptions, score all rows, export results as CSV
acceptanceCriteria: Given a CSV file with columns 'title', 'description', 'url', when uploaded, then all rows are scored and results displayed in a table
Given the CSV has up to 500 rows, when processed, then all rows complete within 5 seconds
Given bulk results are displayed, when the user clicks 'Export Results', then a CSV with scores and feedback downloads

name: URL Auto-Fetch
description: Paste a URL to auto-fetch and populate the page's current title, description, and OG data
acceptanceCriteria: Given a URL is entered in the fetch field, when the user clicks 'Fetch', then the title, description, and OG data are extracted and populated
Given the fetch is in progress, when loading, then a spinner and 'Fetching...' indicator appears
Given the URL cannot be fetched (CORS, timeout), when the error occurs, then a clear error message appears suggesting manual entry
